[2019-02-03 16:27] ruinedshadows: no @jeacaveo (#NeverBrowserer) , I can assure you, you aren't the only one excited about it! However, as always, it's really hard to anticipate everything and predict the future accurately so things tend to take more time than initially thought. Most of the "updates" in this are just a progress report reconfirming that Elyot/the team are still working on things but all the stuff about connecting to stores/foreign distributors and localization and an inkling of mobile talk and the PBWC happening and Chapter 4 coming out, etc. is stuff we've heard about before. Of course, any progress updates are great but I'm just trying to provide you context for why a lot of the older players may be feeling like not much new was said here. Personally, I still am super hyped and can't wait for Prismata to take off and don't mind extra time being taken because I know Elyot cares and at the end of the day a good job will be done (even if it takes time).

[2019-02-03 20:16] mrguy888: Mobile version will be good for the game. Players just want more players to play with and news that isn't directly about that is sort of disappointing to people especially after the steam and f2p launches didn't exactly flood the server with fresh meat. The big push for player is scheduled for after the release of chapter 5 and the chapters seem to have slowed down after 3. That is why announcements that aren't a hard date for the release of chapter 4 are met lukewarmly.

 PBWC is something that has been penciled in twice before and didn't exactly happen which explains why until things are set in stone older players aren't exactly getting themselves excited for it yet. The golden cup shows what the community is capable of doing when solid dates are set but have learned by experience to not get excited before that. @jeacaveo (#NeverBrowserer)
